content.en:
Xuanyu Pavilion.

Ye Tian came back, standing in a large hall of the Xuanyu Pavilion, one after another Sevenfold Origin Ancestors appeared, they were all high-level members of the Xuanyu Pavilion.

"Endless Ancestor, please take out your harvest this time and give one-tenth to the Xuanyu Pavilion!"

A Sevenfold Ancestor said.

The Xuanyu Pavilion only needs one-tenth of the harvest, this is the rule, after all, the Xuanyu Pavilion is just a loose organization, and it has no binding force.

You can even withdraw from the Xuanyu Pavilion at any time, all transactions are fair and just, and if you want to get benefits, you have to work hard yourself.

Of course, the Xuanyu Pavilion will also ensure the safety of the members.

Therefore, Xuanyu Pavilion will never give opportunities in vain.

Just like the chance of the 13th Nest this time, the members not only need to give their own points to get places, but also have to give one-tenth of the resources after they come out.

Of course.

If all the resources are refined in the 13th Nest, then you don't need to take them out.

But with so many resources, there is naturally no way to refine them, and there is no time to refine them.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian took out all kinds of resource materials, he didn't hide any materials, after all, Xuanyu Pavilion had the primordial ancient treasure that spied on everything.

If he hides it, the Xuanyu Pavilion can still find out, unless he brings the Sumeru Dao Bead.

But he has the Sumeru Dao Bead on his body, and the Xuanyu Pavilion can't spy on anything, and he will definitely know that he has the Primordial Ancient Treasure on his body that shields perception, which will cause even more suspicion.

As the treasures were taken out by Ye Tian, the faces of the surrounding Sevenfold Ancestors changed slightly.

"So many resources! And a lot of them are very high-grade !!"

Xuanhuang Daozu, the pavilion master of Xuanyu Pavilion, was a little surprised, many members had already come out of the No. 13 Ancient Nest before.

But compared to Ye Tian, their harvest is simply not worth mentioning.

Among the treasures that Ye Tian took out, there were many of them that could assist in the impact of the Sevenfold Ancestor, and Ye Tian was still taking out the treasures, which showed a large number.

"Endless Ancestor, this son is not simple, I have to inquire about what happened to him in the 13th Ancient Nest!"

Xuanhuang Daozu became interested in Ye Tian, although Xuanyu Pavilion was a loose organization and did not pay attention to cultivating members, but for members of the real demons, he was still willing to cultivate!

After all, the Xuanyu Pavilion also needs a strong person to sit in charge, otherwise without a strong person, the Xuanyu Pavilion would not be able to exist for so long, it would have declined a long time ago!

It didn't take long for all of Ye Tian's resources to be taken out.

In particular, the primordial reincarnation stone, as well as the gold liquid from the primordial god golden drum, really shocked them.

"This time, the No. 13 Ancient Nest appeared Primordial Reincarnation Stone, there are still a lot of them, this news has already come out, but I didn't expect this Endless Origin Ancestor to come in and capture one!

Xuanhuang Dao Ancestor was really surprised, Ye Tian had only broken the boundary more than twenty times, even if he comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, he couldn't do this, right?

Subsequently.

One-tenth of the resources were taken by the Xuanyu Pavilion, and the rest of the resources belonged to Ye Tian.

After Ye Tian left, Xuanhuang Daozu learned about Ye Tian's situation in the No. 13 Ancient Nest.

It didn't take long for him to learn something.

For example, Ye Tian snatched one of the primordial reincarnation stones of Canggu Dao Ancestor, and also escaped from Canggu Dao Ancestor.

And he also basically confirmed that Ye Tian's Yuan Dao was a Ninefold Yuan Dao!

"There are a total of five Dao Ancestors in the Xuanyu Pavilion of the Hanhai District Realm who have comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, three are in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm, and two are in the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm!"

In fact, the Dao Ancestors who comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao in the history of the Xuanyu Pavilion were naturally more than this, and some even became the Eightfold Origin Ancestors, but they left the Xuanyu Pavilion early and joined other big forces, so they were automatically separated from the Xuanyu Pavilion, and naturally they could not be regarded as the Dao Ancestors of the Xuanyu Pavilion.

Of course, those Dao Ancestors can also be regarded as the backers of the Xuanyu Pavilion today.

If it weren't for these backers, Xuanyu Pavilion wouldn't have the status it has today.

"In the future, the Endless Origin Ancestor will also be included in the key cultivation list, this son has not only comprehended the Ninefold Yuan Dao, but also I am afraid that there are a lot of hole cards, at least the ability to save his life is strong, as long as he does not fall in the future, it is not very difficult for a half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor to become a Dao Ancestor like him!"

Xuanhuang Daozu thought to himself.

......

Xuanyu Pavilion, Ye Tian's residence.

After coming back, Ye Tian began to practice in retreat, after all, with so many resources to assist in cultivation, he could cooperate with the Endless Yuan Dao to quickly refine his body and break through the boundaries again and again.

Other than that.

Ye Tian's other copied bodies began to fuse those Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments on his body, fusing these Extreme Dao Ancestral Endowments into Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowments.

In this way, after a short period of time, he will have a large number of Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, and when the time comes, he will comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao, and the speed of progress is unimaginable for other Dao Ancestors!

Time passed slowly, Ye Tian's cultivation continued to grow, breaking the boundaries again and again, and Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu was also constantly fused.

He first fused the Time Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, he didn't know how many Time Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu he had encountered in the past, and now he could naturally replicate and fuse.

Fusion again and again, each fusion was painful, but after a long time, these countless Time Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu finally fused into the Time Yuan Dao Ancestral Fu.

Then there was the fusion of the Spatial Extreme Dao Ancestral Fu, which was also fused by him into the Spatial Yuan Dao Ancestral Fu.

Gradually, Ye Tian had more and more Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment.

And he is breaking more and more boundaries.

Twenty-five times!

Thirty times boundary!

Thirty-five times boundary!

Every time he broke the boundary, Ye Tian's strength increased by a bit, plus he fused so many Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, his foundation potential was greatly improved, and his physical strength also surpassed that of other Dao Ancestors of the same level.

Time flies, and before I know it, 100 million years have passed since the return of the 13th Ancient Nest.

"I've broken the boundary fifty-five times, and I've fused a large number of Yuan Dao Ancestral Fu, and my current strength is stronger than in the past, I don't know how many times. Even if he fights Canggu Dao Ancestor again, although he is still not his opponent, it is almost impossible for him to shatter my body with one blow!"

Ye Tian said quite confidently.

This is the fusion of so many Yuan Dao Ancestor Fu, coupled with his own foundation potential, far surpassing Canggu Dao Ancestor.

Although everyone is a comprehension of the Ninefold Yuan Dao, the strength of his body is different, and his fifty-five times limit may be equivalent to the seventy times of Canggu Dao Ancestor.

"Next, I have to take the time to comprehend the Yuan Dao, this copy body can be cultivated alone, but other copy bodies can continue to comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao, with my current comprehension speed, there is really hope that I will comprehend the Endless Yuan Dao to the Xiaocheng Realm in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm. If I really do it, then I will really be invincible in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor realm!"

Thereupon.

While refining his body, breaking through the boundaries, and improving his cultivation, Ye Tian comprehended the Endless Yuan Dao, and his strength was rapidly improving.
